merged_events.event_description: Diplomatic relations established and the American Embassy at Conakry opened with Robert W. Rinden as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on February 13, 1959, when the American Embassy at Conakry was established with Robert W. Rinden as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

matched.notes: Exact match on date and status. RDCR confirms diplomatic relations established and Embassy opened at Conakry on 1959-02-13.
